program_operator: Federal Public Service Health, Food Chain Safety and Environment
product_name: COMPRESSED EARTH BLOCK – installed with earth adhesive mortar
product_description: Compressed block 140, CEB_140 installed with Léém Earth Adhesive Mortar (EB_EAM)
conformity_basis: in accordance with NBN EN 15804+A2 and B-EPD PCR
declared_scope: To build 1 m² of wall with 140 mm width compressed earth blocks installed with earth adhesive mortar, for a reference service life of 100 years in Belgium
